families.description: Tax structure has not yet been mapped.
No ordinary national personal income tax calculation for the supported scope.
One principal rate applied to a caller-confirmed tax base.
One principal rate after a fixed allowance or standard deduction.
One principal progressive rate schedule with limited adjustments.
Progressive rates with deductions, allowances, credits, rebates or phase-outs.
Tax depends materially on filing status, spouses, dependants or household computation.
National tax combines with state, provincial, cantonal, regional or municipal tax.
Different income categories use materially different schedules.
The system combines alternative calculations, extensive credits, multiple layers or other cross-cutting rules.
